no-restricted-syntax.message: FORBIDDEN: clearRows() wipes an entire sheet permanently. Use SafeSheetOperation from lib/safe-sheets.ts instead. Never delete sheet data without explicit owner approval.
FORBIDDEN: deleteRows() permanently removes data from Google Sheets. Use SafeSheetOperation from lib/safe-sheets.ts instead. Never delete sheet data without explicit owner approval.
FORBIDDEN: row.delete() permanently removes a row from Google Sheets. To add delete functionality, get explicit owner approval and add an eslint-disable comment with justification above the line.
